task_completion.description: Navigate to the issues list for the Payment Gateway API project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser displays the issue tracker page for the 'Payment Gateway API' project, showing a list of existing issues.

task_completion.description: Open the first High priority issue assigned to Michael Turner for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the issue details or edit form for an issue where the 'Priority' field is 'High' and the current 'Assignee' is Michael Turner.

task_completion.description: Reassign the first issue to Jane Doe and add the required note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The issue history or successful update screen shows the assignee changed to Jane Doe and the note 'Reassigning to balance sprint workload' added to the issue.

task_completion.description: Open a second, distinct High priority issue assigned to Michael Turner for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the edit form for a *different* issue (verifiable by a different issue ID or title) with 'High' priority currently assigned to Michael Turner.

task_completion.description: Reassign the second issue to Jane Doe and add the required note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The issue history or successful update screen for the second issue shows the assignee changed to Jane Doe and the note 'Reassigning to balance sprint workload' added.

task_completion.description: Verify that exactly 2 High priority issues are assigned to Jane Doe and Michael Turner's Normal priority issues are untouched.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The project issues list shows exactly 2 issues assigned to Jane Doe (both High priority), and Michael Turner is still assigned to his Normal priority issues.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to reassign issues.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interactions within a web browser navigating the issue tracker (e.g., Redmine). The agent should not be using terminal commands (like curl or python scripts) to update the issues via API.

integrity.description: The required note was entered into the actual issue tracker interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Reassigning to balance sprint workload' being typed or pasted into the specific 'Notes' or 'Comment' text area of the issue edit form, rather than a separate text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not create new issues to simulate reassignment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent edits existing issues rather than clicking 'New issue' and creating duplicate tasks assigned to Jane Doe.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project Identifier: 'payment-gateway-api'. Source User: 'mturner' (Michael Turner). Target User: 'jdoe' (Jane Doe). Required Move Count: Exactly 2. Required Priority: 'High'. Required Note: 'Reassigning to balance sprint workload'. Normal priority issues must not be moved.
